questions.stem: The company ___ its revenue target last quarter.
questions.explanation: 此处需要过去时，因为'last quarter'表示过去的时间，应使用一般过去式exceeded。

questions.stem: By the time the audit is complete, the finance team ___ all the necessary documents.
questions.explanation: by the time引导的时间状语从句表示将来某一时间之前完成的动作，主句应使用将来完成时will have prepared。

questions.stem: The marketing department ___ on the new campaign since January.
questions.explanation: since January表示从一月到现在一直在做的事情，应使用现在完成进行时has been working。

questions.stem: If the board ___ the proposal yesterday, we would have started production this week.
questions.explanation: 这是与过去事实相反的虚拟语气，if从句应使用过去完成时had approved。

questions.stem: Our sales team ___ a training session every Monday morning.
questions.explanation: every Monday morning表示习惯性的动作，应使用一般现在时attends。

questions.stem: The project manager announced that the deadline ___ to the following Friday.
questions.explanation: 在间接引语中，主句用过去时announced，从句应使用过去完成时had been moved来表示时态后移。

questions.stem: Ms. Tanaka ___ as the regional manager for five years before she was promoted.
questions.explanation: before she was promoted表明在过去某时间点之前已持续的动作，应使用过去完成时had served。

questions.stem: Had the shipment arrived on schedule, the production line ___ any delays.
questions.explanation: 这是省略if的虚拟语气倒装句，与过去事实相反，主句应使用would not have experienced。

questions.stem: The warehouse staff ___ the inventory count by the end of today.
questions.explanation: by the end of today表示到今天结束为止将完成的动作，应使用将来完成时will have finished。

questions.stem: Customer complaints ___ significantly since the company introduced its new quality control measures.
questions.explanation: since引导的时间状语表示从过去到现在的变化，应使用现在完成时have decreased。

questions.stem: The consultant recommended that the firm ___ its IT infrastructure before expanding overseas.
questions.explanation: recommend后接that从句应使用虚拟语气，动词用原形upgrade（省略should）。

questions.stem: Next month, the CEO ___ a keynote speech at the annual technology conference.
questions.explanation: Next month表示将来的时间，应使用将来时will deliver。

questions.stem: The negotiations ___ smoothly until one party raised concerns about the payment terms.
questions.explanation: until引导的从句表示过去某个时间点，之前一直在进行的动作应使用过去完成进行时had been proceeding。

questions.stem: Once the renovation ___, the office will be able to accommodate fifty additional staff members.
questions.explanation: once引导的时间状语从句中用一般现在时is completed表示将来的动作，主句用将来时。

questions.stem: The new branch office ___ next Monday at 9 A.M.
questions.explanation: next Monday表示将来的具体时间，应使用将来时will open。

questions.stem: The meeting is scheduled ___ 3 P.M. on Friday.
questions.explanation: 具体时间点前用介词at，如at 3 P.M.。

questions.stem: All expense reports must be submitted ___ the end of each month.
questions.explanation: by the end of表示'在...之前'，是固定搭配，表示截止时间。

questions.stem: Mr. Park has been working ___ the Seoul branch since 2019.
questions.explanation: at表示在某个具体的工作地点或分公司，at the branch是常见搭配。

questions.stem: The training program is designed to prepare employees ___ leadership roles.
questions.explanation: prepare someone for something是固定搭配，意为'为某事做准备'。

questions.stem: The new policy will remain in effect ___ further notice.
questions.explanation: until further notice是固定短语，意为'直到另行通知'。

questions.stem: The contract was signed ___ behalf of the entire department.
questions.explanation: on behalf of是固定短语，意为'代表'。

questions.stem: The factory is located ___ close proximity to the shipping port.
questions.explanation: in close proximity to是固定短语，意为'在...的附近'，介词用in。

questions.stem: Please send the updated report directly ___ the department head.
questions.explanation: send something to someone是固定搭配，to表示发送对象。

questions.stem: The supervisor insisted ___ reviewing the safety protocols before approving the project.
questions.explanation: insist on doing something是固定搭配，意为'坚持要做某事'。

questions.stem: The conference room is located ___ the third floor of the main building.
questions.explanation: 在楼层前用on，on the third floor是固定搭配。

questions.stem: The merger resulted ___ a significant increase in the company's market share.
questions.explanation: result in是固定搭配，意为'导致，结果是'。

questions.stem: Applications for the position must be received ___ March 15.
questions.explanation: by March 15表示截止日期，意为'在3月15日之前'。

questions.stem: ___ the budget was limited, the team managed to complete the project on time.
questions.explanation: Although表示'尽管'，引导让步状语从句，后接完整的句子。

questions.stem: ___ the heavy rain, the outdoor event proceeded as planned.
questions.explanation: Despite后接名词短语（the heavy rain），表示'尽管'。Although后需接完整句子。

questions.stem: The shipment will be delayed ___ the supplier can resolve the quality issue.
questions.explanation: until表示'直到...为止'，说明延迟会持续到问题解决。

questions.stem: ___ the CEO was presenting the quarterly results, the board members reviewed the financial statements.
questions.explanation: While表示'在...期间'，引导时间状语从句，表示两件事同时发生。

questions.stem: The product launch will be postponed ___ there are unexpected improvements in the supply chain.
questions.explanation: unless表示'除非'，意为除非供应链有意外改善，否则产品发布会推迟。

questions.stem: The eastern region saw a 20 percent increase in sales, ___ the western region experienced a slight decline.
questions.explanation: whereas表示'然而，相比之下'，用于对比两种不同的情况。

questions.stem: We decided to hire additional staff ___ the workload has increased significantly.
questions.explanation: because表示原因，'因为工作量大幅增加'是招聘更多员工的原因。

questions.stem: ___ having extensive experience in the industry, the applicant was not selected for the senior position.
questions.explanation: Despite having表示'尽管拥有'，despite后接动名词形式，表示让步关系。

questions.stem: Employees may work remotely ___ they obtain prior approval from their supervisors.
questions.explanation: provided that表示'只要，如果'，是条件连词，意为只要获得上级批准就可以远程办公。

questions.stem: The company invested in new technology ___ it could improve operational efficiency.
questions.explanation: so that表示目的，'以便提高运营效率'是投资新技术的目的。

questions.stem: The manager ___ approved the budget will attend the meeting tomorrow.
questions.explanation: 关系代词who引导定语从句修饰the manager（人），在从句中作主语。

questions.stem: The report ___ was submitted last week contains several important recommendations.
questions.explanation: 关系代词that/which引导定语从句修饰the report（物），在从句中作主语。

questions.stem: The client ___ account was overdue received a formal notice from the billing department.
questions.explanation: whose表示所有格关系，修饰account，意为'其账户逾期的客户'。

questions.stem: All department heads should familiarize ___ with the new safety regulations before the inspection.
questions.explanation: familiarize oneself with是固定搭配，主语是they，反身代词用themselves。

questions.stem: The engineer to ___ the project was assigned has over fifteen years of experience.
questions.explanation: 介词to后面的关系代词指人时应使用whom，to whom the project was assigned意为'项目被分配给的工程师'。

questions.stem: Each employee must submit ___ performance review form before the deadline.
questions.explanation: each employee是单数，需要用单数形容词性物主代词his or her，此处their也被广泛接受。

questions.stem: The two proposals are quite different from one another; ___ focuses on cost reduction, while the other emphasizes revenue growth.
questions.explanation: one...the other是固定搭配，用于指两者中的一个，one作主语。

questions.stem: The director praised the team members for ___ outstanding performance during the product launch.
questions.explanation: 修饰名词performance应使用形容词性物主代词their。

questions.stem: She was appointed as ___ director of the marketing division last year.
questions.explanation: 职位头衔在as后面通常不用冠词，特别是当该职位是唯一的时候，此处用零冠词。

questions.stem: We need to hire ___ experienced accountant for the new branch office.
questions.explanation: an用于以元音发音开头的单数可数名词前，experienced以元音音素开头。

questions.stem: ___ information provided in the brochure is subject to change without notice.
questions.explanation: 此处information指的是宣传册中特定的信息，需要用定冠词the来特指。

questions.stem: The board held ___ emergency meeting to discuss the unexpected financial results.
questions.explanation: an用于以元音发音开头的单数可数名词前，emergency以元音音素开头。

questions.stem: All attendees were given ___ access to the conference materials online.
questions.explanation: access是不可数名词，在此处为泛指，不需要冠词，使用零冠词。

questions.stem: ___ equipment ordered for the new laboratory has not yet been delivered.
questions.explanation: 此处equipment指特定订购的设备，需要用定冠词the来特指。equipment是不可数名词，不用a/an。

questions.stem: The human resources department is looking for ___ qualified candidate to fill the vacancy.
questions.explanation: a用于辅音发音开头的单数可数名词前，qualified以辅音音素/kw/开头。

questions.stem: Mr. Hoffman was elected ___ chairperson of the board at yesterday's general meeting.
questions.explanation: 当选某一唯一职位时，be elected chairperson不加冠词，与be appointed as类似。

questions.stem: The company plans to ___ its operations to Southeast Asia within the next two years.
questions.explanation: expand表示'扩展，扩大'（业务范围）。expend意为'花费'，extend意为'延长'，extract意为'提取'。

questions.stem: The warranty does not ___ damage caused by misuse or unauthorized modifications.
questions.explanation: cover在此表示'涵盖，包括'（保修范围内）。recover意为'恢复'，discover意为'发现'，uncover意为'揭露'。

questions.stem: The accounting team needs to ___ all transactions before the fiscal year ends.
questions.explanation: reconcile表示'核对，对账'，是会计术语。record意为'记录'，reconsider意为'重新考虑'，recommend意为'推荐'。

questions.stem: Please ___ the attached document for your reference before the meeting.
questions.explanation: review表示'查看，审阅'，常用于商务场景中请求查看文件。revise意为'修改'，reveal意为'揭示'，revoke意为'撤销'。

questions.stem: The new regulation will ___ all companies operating within the financial services sector.
questions.explanation: affect表示'影响'，是动词。effect是名词'效果'，infect意为'感染'，reflect意为'反映'。

questions.stem: The HR department will ___ interviews with all shortlisted candidates next week.
questions.explanation: conduct表示'进行，实施'（面试、调查等），是商务用语。contact意为'联系'，conclude意为'结束'，confirm意为'确认'。

questions.stem: The board voted to ___ the merger agreement after months of negotiations.
questions.explanation: ratify表示'批准，正式认可'（协议、条约等）。rectify意为'纠正'，justify意为'证明...合理'，verify意为'核实'。

questions.stem: Employees are encouraged to ___ any workplace safety concerns to their immediate supervisors.
questions.explanation: report表示'报告，汇报'，常用于表达向上级反映问题。support意为'支持'，deport意为'驱逐'，transport意为'运输'。

questions.stem: The company has decided to ___ several new positions in response to growing demand.
questions.explanation: create表示'创建，设立'（新职位）。delete意为'删除'，relate意为'关联'，donate意为'捐赠'。

questions.stem: The consultant's findings were ___ with the data collected by the internal audit team.
questions.explanation: consistent表示'一致的'，be consistent with意为'与...一致'。persistent意为'坚持的'，resistant意为'抵抗的'，insistent意为'坚决的'。

questions.stem: The manager asked her assistant to ___ copies of the agenda for all meeting participants.
questions.explanation: distribute表示'分发'。contribute意为'贡献'，attribute意为'归因于'，substitute意为'替代'。

questions.stem: All employees must ___ to the company's code of conduct at all times.
questions.explanation: adhere表示'遵守'，adhere to意为'遵守，坚持'（规则、准则）。adapt意为'适应'，adopt意为'采用'，admit意为'承认'。

questions.stem: The CEO emphasized the importance of ___ between departments to achieve company goals.
questions.explanation: collaboration表示'合作，协作'，是商务中常用词汇。collection意为'收集'，celebration意为'庆祝'，calculation意为'计算'。

questions.stem: The newly appointed director is expected to ___ significant changes within the organization.
questions.explanation: implement表示'实施，执行'（变革、计划等）。complement意为'补充'，compliment意为'赞美'，supplement意为'补充'。

questions.stem: Due to unforeseen circumstances, the annual conference has been ___ indefinitely.
questions.explanation: postponed表示'推迟'。imposed意为'施加'，proposed意为'提议'，composed意为'组成'。

questions.stem: All employees ___ submit their timesheets by Friday afternoon without exception.
questions.explanation: must表示强制性的义务和要求，'必须在周五下午前提交'。should语气较弱，would/could不表示强制义务。

questions.stem: The marketing budget ___ be increased if sales continue to grow at this rate.
questions.explanation: might表示可能性，'如果销售持续增长，营销预算可能会增加'。语境表示一种可能性而非确定性。

questions.stem: Visitors ___ wear identification badges at all times while on the premises.
questions.explanation: must表示规定和要求，'在场所内必须始终佩戴身份证'。

questions.stem: Candidates ___ have at least five years of relevant experience to be considered for the position.
questions.explanation: should表示'应该'，在此表示对候选人的期望和建议性要求。

questions.stem: The shipment ___ have arrived by now; please check with the logistics department.
questions.explanation: should have arrived表示'按理应该已经到了'，表达对过去事件的推测和期望。

questions.stem: Had I known about the policy change, I ___ have prepared a different proposal.
questions.explanation: would have prepared是与过去事实相反的虚拟语气结果句，表示'我本会准备一份不同的提案'。

questions.stem: If the shipment ___ on time, we will meet the production deadline.
questions.explanation: 在条件句中，if从句用一般现在时arrives表示将来可能发生的事。

questions.stem: If the company ___ in more research last year, the new product would have been launched sooner.
questions.explanation: 与过去事实相反的虚拟语气，if从句用过去完成时had invested。

questions.stem: ___ the new software is installed properly, the system should run without any issues.
questions.explanation: Provided that表示'只要'，引导条件从句，意为只要软件正确安装。

questions.stem: The project will not proceed ___ the client approves the revised budget.
questions.explanation: unless表示'除非'，意为除非客户批准修订后的预算，否则项目不会继续。

questions.stem: If you ___ any questions about the new policy, please contact the HR department.
questions.explanation: 在条件句中表示现实的一般情况，if从句用一般现在时have。

questions.stem: Were the proposal to be accepted, the company ___ immediately begin recruiting additional engineers.
questions.explanation: Were...to be是虚拟语气的倒装形式，表示假设条件。主句用would表示结果。
